mapper.select: select count(1) from t_order where status = 1
select count(1) from t_product where status = 1 and stock < #{lowStockThreshold}
select count(1) from t_marketing_activity where status = 1 and (start_time is null or start_time <= #{nowTime}) and (end_time is null or end_time >= #{nowTime})

select count(1) as order_count, ifnull(sum(ifnull(discount_amount, 0)), 0) as discount_amount from t_order where status in (1, 2, 3) and pay_time is not null and pay_time >= #{startTime} and pay_time < #{endTimeExclusive} and (ifnull(discount_amount, 0) > 0 or (activity_summary is not null and activity_summary != ''))

select date_format(pay_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as date_label, ifnull(sum(pay_amount), 0) as amount from t_order where status in (1, 2, 3) and pay_time is not null and pay_time >= #{startTime} and pay_time < #{endTimeExclusive} group by date_format(pay_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order by date_label asc
select status, count(1) as count from t_order where create_time >= #{startTime} and create_time < #{endTimeExclusive} group by status order by status asc

select oi.product_id, max(oi.product_name) as name, ifnull(sum(oi.total_price), 0) as amount, ifnull(sum(oi.quantity), 0) as quantity from t_order_item oi inner join t_order o on oi.order_id = o.order_id where o.status in (1, 2, 3) and o.pay_time is not null and o.pay_time >= #{startTime} and o.pay_time < #{endTimeExclusive} group by oi.product_id order by amount desc, quantity desc limit 10

select ifnull(c.category_name, '未分类') as name, ifnull(sum(oi.total_price), 0) as value, count(1) as count from t_order_item oi inner join t_order o on oi.order_id = o.order_id left join t_product p on oi.product_id = p.product_id left join t_category c on p.category_id = c.category_id where o.status in (1, 2, 3) and o.pay_time is not null and o.pay_time >= #{startTime} and o.pay_time < #{endTimeExclusive} group by ifnull(c.category_name, '未分类') order by value desc

select date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as date_label, count(1) as count from t_wxuser where create_time >= #{startTime} and create_time < #{endTimeExclusive} group by date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order by date_label asc
select product_id, product_name, stock, image_url from t_product where status = 1 and stock < #{lowStockThreshold} order by stock asc, product_id asc limit 8

select activity_id, title, type, end_time, datediff(end_time, #{nowTime}) as remaining_days from t_marketing_activity where status = 1 and end_time is not null and end_time >= #{nowTime} and end_time < #{endingSoonTime} order by end_time asc limit 8
